---
title: "Oliviawork"
format: html
---
This doc will create part 1 of the data story: A general visualization 

Idea: An interactive(?) map of heathcare coverage types in the US 
- need a maptile and maybe a census key

```{r}
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
states <- read_sf("../data/raw/cb_2018_us_state_20m/cb_2018_us_state_20m.shp")

leaflet(states) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addPolygons()
```
